title: AgentMemoryConfig
description: Per-agent configuration for the Assistant Memory plugin. Stored as config.json in the agent's data directory.

lmStudioUrl.description: LM Studio embeddings API endpoint URL.

indexStrategy.description: When to update the embedding index.

periodicInterval.description: Periodic sync interval in minutes (used with on-change-plus-periodic).

autoRecall.description: Inject relevant memories before agent starts.

autoCapture.description: Auto-capture important information after agent ends.

captureMaxChars.description: Max characters to capture per message (auto-capture).

backupDir.description: Directory for backups relative to agent data dir.

dataDir.description: Base directory for memory storage relative to agent data dir.
